task_completion.description: Add the required title to the top of the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text box containing 'Summer Coffee Display - Planogram A' is visible at the top of the EdrawMax canvas.

task_completion.description: Create a shelving unit with exactly 3 shelves.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visual representation of a shelving unit with exactly three distinct horizontal shelves is present on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Place 4 dark/black items and a $18.99 price label on the top shelf.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Exactly 4 dark or black shapes ('Premium Beans') and a text label reading '$18.99' are located on the top shelf.

task_completion.description: Place 4 light/orange items and a $14.50 price label on the middle shelf.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Exactly 4 light or orange shapes ('House Blend') and a text label reading '$14.50' are located on the middle shelf.

task_completion.description: Place 5 silver/blue items and a $24.00 price label on the bottom shelf.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Exactly 5 silver or blue shapes ('Travel Mugs') and a text label reading '$24.00' are located on the bottom shelf.

task_completion.description: Save the diagram as an .eddx file and export as a .png file in the Diagrams folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Save/Export dialogs showing the path '/home/ga/Diagrams/coffee_planogram.eddx' and '/home/ga/Diagrams/coffee_planogram.png', or the EdrawMax title bar showing 'coffee_planogram' indicating the file was saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the EdrawMax application interface being actively used (e.g., selecting shapes, typing text), not a terminal or text editor modifying XML files.

integrity.description: The agent built the planogram from scratch rather than opening a pre-existing completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Early screenshots show a blank canvas or the progressive addition of shapes and text, rather than the immediate appearance of a fully completed diagram.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely placed and colored the shapes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visible use of the shape library, color fill tools, or drag-and-drop actions within the EdrawMax interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected exact strings in the diagram are '$18.99', '$14.50', '$24.00', 'Summer Coffee Display', and 'Planogram A'. The expected output paths are '/home/ga/Diagrams/coffee_planogram.eddx' and '/home/ga/Diagrams/coffee_planogram.png'.
